channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Tampa police issue Purple Alert for missing 18-year-old
item.description: Tampa police are searching for an 18-year-old man whose family fears for his safety after he disappeared Wednesday afternoon and did not return home.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Person hospitalized after shooting tied to altercation in Plant City: HCSO
item.description: A shooting in Plant City left one person hurt Wednesday night after an argument between two individuals turned violent, according to the Hillsborough County Sheriff’s Office.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Jury finds man guilty of 2024 death at Ruskin marina
item.description: Jury finds man guilty of second-degree murder at a Ruskin Marina in 2024. Kamal Padlowski met the victim at a bar near Bahia Beach Boulevard before inviting him back to his boat.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Highland City homeowners fed up with truck driver tearing up neighborhood property
item.description: A driver tore through a retention pond in Highland City on Monday around 6:30 p.m., leaving residents in a local neighborhood facing costly repairs for repeated property damage.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Bertha weakens and some changes coming our way

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Top Headlines and Weather for July 22
item.description: Over 50 Florida home elevation projects are approved after long delays, TPA joins TSA's new private screening program, and heat builds before storms.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Recent rabies case prompts free rabies vaccination, microchipping event in Polk County
item.description: With recent rabies cases reported in Polk County, Animal Control and SPCA Florida are urging pet owners not to take any chances.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Food Trucks find ways to beat the heat
item.description: The Empire Food Plaza on Hillsborough Avenue features 14 food trucks, but during the middle of the day, in the middle of the summer, only a few of them are open because of the high temperatures.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trump attends transfer of US casualties, warning of escalation with Iran
item.description: President Trump warned the U.S. would respond to continued Iranian strikes on shipping by destroying bridges and power plants in the country.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: hurricane] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] FEMA: More than 50 Florida home elevation projects approved after long delays
item.description: The latest approvals mark progress for the Elevate Florida program, but many homeowners remain in limbo as another hurricane season continues.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] St. Petersburg man charged with sexual battery after 12-year-old niece gives birth to baby: PPPD
item.description: Pinellas Park Police Department (PPPD) said it arrested a St. Petersburg man accused of impregnating his 12-year-old niece.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Operation Southern Slow Down wraps in Sarasota County with nearly 800 citations issued
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] City leaders vote to shield more North Port land from development
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Business remains open as GoFundMe surpasses $300
